---
title: "About"
description: "Contributors, licenses, and citation information for the Introduction to Version Control with Git and GitHub within RStudio tutorial."
date: 2026-07-21
author:
  - name: Mike Croucher
    affiliation: "Community Developer Advocate, MathWorks"
  - name: Malika Ihle
    affiliation: LMU Open Science Center
    orcid: "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3242-5981"
citation:
  title: "Introduction to Version Control with Git and GitHub within RStudio"
  url: https://lmu-osc.github.io/Introduction-RStudio-Git-GitHub
---

## Contributors

This tutorial was originally created by Mike Croucher and later adapted by Malika Ihle for the LMU Open Science Center.

## Licenses

The overall project is available under the [**CC BY-SA 4.0**](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/) license found at [LICENSE](LICENSE.md); all code without any narrative text is also (at your option) available under the [**CC0 1.0 Universal**](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/) license found at [LICENSE-CODE](LICENSE-CODE.md).

## Tutorial Template Quarto Extension

This tutorial uses the [`lmu-osc/tutorial-template`](https://github.com/lmu-osc/tutorial-template) Quarto extension [@callahan2026].


### References

::: {#refs}
:::

## How to Cite

To cite this tutorial, please refer to the project's [CITATION.cff](CITATION.cff) file or use the BibTeX citation provided in the appendix below.
